data.name: startup.stage.loadingProducts
data.value: Loading local products and special products...

data.name: ErrorItemNotFound
data.value: No item found. Local cache is still available.

data.name: confirmation.exit.message
data.value: Are you sure you want to exit the POS application?

data.name: settings.testSalesData.confirm.message
data.value: Delete all test sales data? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: pos.status.noLocalMatch
data.value: No local item found. Checkout can continue offline.

data.name: pos.status.multipleMatches
data.value: Found {0} items. Select one to add.

data.name: pos.status.promotionFallback
data.value: Promotions not updated. Using cached local prices.

data.name: cart.status.zeroPriceItem
data.value: Cart contains a zero-price item. Update the price before checkout.

data.name: cart.status.quantityMustBeInteger
data.value: Item quantity must be a positive integer.

data.name: pos.status.discountAmountTooHigh
data.value: Discount amount cannot exceed the current total.

data.name: pos.status.discountPercentOutOfRange
data.value: Discount percent must be between 0 and 100.

data.name: payment.installment.switchHelp
data.value: Collect a deposit and customer details

data.name: payment.installment.customerDialogHelp
data.value: Enter the required customer name and phone for this installment order.

data.name: payment.installment.confirmFullFirstPayment.message
data.value: The first installment payment covers the full order amount. Continue creating an installment order?

data.name: payment.installment.confirmPickupAfterPaidOff.message
data.value: This installment order is fully paid. Confirm customer pickup now?

data.name: payment.installment.status.customerRequired
data.value: Customer name and phone are required.

data.name: payment.installment.status.firstPaymentBelowMinimum
data.value: First installment payment must be at least $20.00.

data.name: payment.installment.status.totalBelowMinimum
data.value: Installment orders must be at least $50.00.

data.name: payment.installment.status.invalidAmount
data.value: Installment payment amount must be greater than zero and not exceed the outstanding amount.

data.name: payment.installment.status.singleTenderOnly
data.value: Installment mode accepts one payment at a time.

data.name: payment.installment.status.noRepaymentAllowed
data.value: This installment order cannot receive more payments.

data.name: payment.installment.status.pickupConfirmFailed
data.value: Pickup confirmation failed; receipt printed as pending pickup. {0}

data.name: payment.voucher.scanOrEnter
data.value: Scan the voucher barcode or enter the voucher number.

data.name: payment.status.nonCashAlreadyCoversOrder
data.value: Non-cash payments already cover this order.

data.name: payment.voucher.refundAmountMustBePositive
data.value: Voucher refund amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: payment.voucher.refundOrderReferenceRequired
data.value: Voucher refund order reference is required.

data.name: payment.voucher.refundIdempotencyKeyRequired
data.value: Voucher refund idempotency key is required.

data.name: payment.card.amountMustBePositive
data.value: Card amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: payment.card.linklyUnavailable
data.value: ANZ Linkly terminal adapter is unavailable.

data.name: payment.card.squareMissingCheckoutId
data.value: Square checkout did not return an id.

data.name: payment.card.squareAmountMismatch
data.value: Square authorized amount did not match the requested amount.

data.name: payment.card.squareCanceled
data.value: Square checkout was not completed. Please try again.

data.name: payment.card.squareCanceledBuyer
data.value: Square checkout was canceled by the buyer. Ask the customer to try again or choose another payment method.

data.name: payment.card.squareCanceledSeller
data.value: Square checkout was canceled. Please start the card payment again.

data.name: payment.card.squareTimedOut
data.value: Square checkout timed out before the customer completed payment.

data.name: payment.card.squareTerminalOffline
data.value: Square terminal is offline. Check the terminal network and try again.

data.name: payment.card.squareTerminalNotPickedUp
data.value: Square terminal did not pick up the checkout. Check that the terminal is online, then try again.

data.name: payment.card.squareInvalidResponse
data.value: Square terminal returned an invalid response.

data.name: payment.card.squareMissingPaymentId
data.value: Square checkout did not return a payment id.

data.name: payment.card.squarePaymentAmountMismatch
data.value: Square payment amount did not match the requested amount.

data.name: payment.card.squarePaymentCurrencyMismatch
data.value: Square payment currency did not match the requested currency.

data.name: payment.card.squareRefundMissingReference
data.value: Square refund requires an original Square payment reference.

data.name: payment.card.error.overlay.connectionFailed.message
data.value: Unable to connect to the card terminal. Please check the terminal's power and network connection, then try again.

data.name: payment.card.error.overlay.cloudCommunicationFailed.message
data.value: Communication with the cloud card service failed. Please check your network and try again.

data.name: payment.card.error.overlay.timeout.message
data.value: The card transaction timed out. Please check the terminal status and try again.

data.name: payment.card.error.overlay.squareCommunicationFailed.message
data.value: Communication with the Square terminal failed. Please check the Square terminal and network, then try again.

data.name: payment.card.error.overlay.unexpected.message
data.value: An unexpected error occurred during card payment. Please try again. If the problem persists, contact technical support.

data.name: payment.card.error.overlay.activeSession.message
data.value: POS will check the previous Linkly transaction before another card payment. The current order will stay on this screen.

data.name: payment.card.error.overlay.fallback.message
data.value: The selected Linkly mode is unavailable and no transaction was submitted. Switch to {0}?

data.name: success.subtitle
data.value: The transaction has been processed successfully.

data.name: receipt.drawer.openFailed
data.value: Cash drawer could not be opened.

data.name: receipt.printer.portOpenFailed
data.value: Printer port could not be opened.

data.name: receipt.printer.lineSpacingFailed
data.value: Printer line spacing could not be set.

data.name: receipt.printer.barcodeFailed
data.value: Printer barcode could not be printed.

data.name: receipt.printer.qrCodeFailed
data.value: Printer QR code could not be printed.

data.name: receipt.printer.textFailed
data.value: Printer text could not be printed.

data.name: receipt.printer.cutPaperFailed
data.value: Printer paper could not be cut.

data.name: receipt.printer.statusReadFailed
data.value: Printer status could not be read.

data.name: customer.promotionBody
data.value: Fresh market selection this weekend and member-only savings.

data.name: customerDisplay.window.opened
data.value: Customer display opened on the second display.

data.name: customerDisplay.window.openedNormal
data.value: Customer display opened in a normal window on the second display.

data.name: customerDisplay.window.openedFullscreen
data.value: Customer display opened full screen on the second display.

data.name: customerDisplay.window.noSecondDisplay
data.value: No second display detected. Customer display was not opened.

data.name: shell.cashierLogin.overlayMessage
data.value: Scan a cashier barcode to continue.

data.name: shell.cashierLogin.tooltip
data.value: Scan or enter cashier barcode / emergency QR code

data.name: shell.cashierLogin.status.required
data.value: Enter or scan a cashier barcode or emergency QR code.

data.name: shell.cashierLogin.status.invalidOrDisabled
data.value: Cashier barcode is invalid or disabled.

data.name: shell.cashierLogin.status.offlineSuccess
data.value: Signed in using the offline cashier cache.

data.name: shell.cashierLogin.status.emergencyExpired
data.value: The emergency login QR code has expired.

data.name: shell.cashierLogin.status.emergencyNotActive
data.value: The emergency login QR code is not active yet.

data.name: shell.cashierLogin.status.emergencyKeyUnknown
data.value: The emergency login signing key is unknown. Update the POS and try again.

data.name: shell.cashierLogin.status.emergencyInvalid
data.value: The emergency login QR code is invalid.

data.name: shell.cashierLogin.status.emergencyTooLong
data.value: The emergency login QR code is too long.

data.name: shell.cashierLogin.status.emergencyClockRollback
data.value: The system clock is earlier than the trusted time. Connect to the network and sync the clock.

data.name: shell.cashierLogin.status.emergencyWrongStore
data.value: The emergency login QR code is for a different store.

data.name: shell.sync.retryCompleted
data.value: Order upload retry completed: {0} succeeded, {1} failed.

data.name: shell.sync.caption
data.value: Shows failed, pending, and syncing order uploads.

data.name: success.syncQueued
data.value: Order saved locally and queued for upload.

data.name: specialProducts.empty
data.value: No special products cached for this store.

data.name: specialProducts.status.loaded
data.value: Loaded {0} special products from local cache.

data.name: specialProducts.status.searchResults
data.value: Found {0} products that can be marked special.

data.name: specialProducts.status.onlineRequired
data.value: Go online to add or remove special product marks.

data.name: specialProducts.status.scanRequiresEdit
data.value: Open edit mode before scanning special products.

data.name: specialProducts.status.scanConfirm
data.value: Found {0}. Confirm to mark it as special.

data.name: specialProducts.status.downloadCompleted
data.value: Downloaded {0} special item lookups and unmarked {1} local products.

data.name: returns.searchHint
data.value: Scan order number, or scan product when no-receipt return is on

data.name: returns.staleWarning
data.value: Return records may be stale while using local fallback.

data.name: returns.openItem.subtitle
data.value: Use OPENITEM from the local catalog, then enter the refund retail price.

data.name: payment.cash.status.returnCheckoutNotReady
data.value: Refund checkout is not implemented yet. Remove return lines or use the refund payment page later.

data.name: payment.zeroSettlement.noTenders
data.value: No payment is required for this order.

data.name: payment.status.ready
data.value: Add payment tenders until the order is fully paid.

data.name: payment.refund.status.ready
data.value: Add refund tenders until the refund is fully covered.

data.name: payment.zeroSettlement.status.ready
data.value: This order balances to zero. Complete the order without adding a tender.

data.name: payment.status.alreadyFullyPaid
data.value: The order is already fully paid.

data.name: payment.linklyFallback.succeeded
data.value: Card approved after the cashier confirmed switching from {0} to {1}. {2}

data.name: payment.linklyFallback.allFailed
data.value: All configured Linkly modes failed before a final payment result was received.

data.name: payment.linklyFallback.cancelled
data.value: Backup Linkly payment was cancelled. No additional card payment was started.

data.name: payment.linklyFallback.promotePrimary
data.value: Ask a supervisor to change the preferred Linkly mode in Settings if needed.

data.name: payment.status.removeTendersBeforeBack
data.value: Remove added tenders or complete the payment before returning to POS.

data.name: payment.status.cardExceedsRemaining
data.value: Card tender cannot exceed the remaining amount.

data.name: payment.status.voucherExceedsRemaining
data.value: Voucher tender cannot exceed the remaining amount.

data.name: payment.status.unsupportedMethod
data.value: This payment method is not supported.

data.name: payment.status.noTendersAdded
data.value: Add at least one tender before completing payment.

data.name: payment.status.remainingBalance
data.value: The order must be fully paid before completion.

data.name: payment.refund.status.noTendersAdded
data.value: Add at least one refund tender before completing the refund.

data.name: payment.refund.status.remainingBalance
data.value: The refund must be fully covered before completion.

data.name: payment.refund.status.voucherOfflineUnavailable
data.value: Voucher refunds are unavailable while offline. Reconnect before using refund voucher.

data.name: payment.status.duplicateVoucher
data.value: This voucher has already been added.

data.name: payment.status.voucherCodeRequired
data.value: Enter a voucher code before adding voucher payment.

data.name: payment.status.duplicatePaymentMethod
data.value: This payment method has already been added.

data.name: payment.status.paymentMethodOrder
data.value: Add tenders in voucher, cash, then card order.

data.name: payment.status.cardMustBeFinalTender
data.value: Card must be the final payment tender.

data.name: payment.status.voucherReleased
data.value: Voucher payment has been rolled back.

data.name: payment.status.voucherReleaseFailed
data.value: Voucher rollback failed. Retry or wait for the lock to expire.

data.name: payment.status.retryVoucherUpload
data.value: Retry the voucher order upload before changing tenders.

data.name: payment.status.uploadFailed
data.value: Voucher order upload failed. Press Complete Payment to retry.

data.name: deviceRegistration.reregister.subtitle
data.value: Select the store to switch this device registration to.

data.name: deviceRegistration.status.missingAuthorization
data.value: Device is active but missing authorization details. Please contact support.

data.name: deviceRegistration.status.selectStore
data.value: Select a store and submit this register for approval.

data.name: deviceRegistration.status.noReregisterStores
data.value: No other stores are available for device reregistration.

data.name: deviceRegistration.status.selectReregisterStore
data.value: Select a new store and submit device reregistration.

data.name: deviceRegistration.status.switchStore
data.value: Select a new store to switch this pending registration.

data.name: returns.status.default
data.value: Scan order number to start a receipt return.

data.name: returns.status.noReceiptMode
data.value: No-receipt return enabled. Scan a product to add it.

data.name: returns.status.receiptMode
data.value: Receipt return mode enabled. Scan an order number.

data.name: returns.status.lookupPrompt
data.value: Scan order number to start a receipt return.

data.name: returns.status.loadedOnline
data.value: Loaded online order and return records.

data.name: returns.status.loadedLocalStaleWithError
data.value: Loaded local order; online lookup failed. {0}

data.name: returns.status.scanProduct
data.value: Scan a product code to add a no-receipt return line.

data.name: returns.status.productNotFound
data.value: Product was not found in the local catalog.

data.name: returns.status.loadedLocalStale
data.value: Loaded local order; online order history is not available.

data.name: returns.status.openItemPrompt
data.value: Enter a no-barcode item name and retail price.

data.name: returns.status.openItemPriceRequired
data.value: Enter a retail price greater than zero.

data.name: returns.status.openItemMissing
data.value: OPENITEM was not found in the local catalog.

data.name: returns.status.openItemDuplicate
data.value: Multiple OPENITEM records were found in the local catalog.

data.name: main.catalogSync.timedOut
data.value: Catalog sync timed out. Using the local catalog for now.

data.name: main.catalogSync.initialDownloadTimedOut
data.value: Initial catalog download was canceled before it completed.

data.name: main.reregister.previewUnsupported
data.value: Device reregistration is unavailable in preview mode.

data.name: main.reregister.cartNotEmpty
data.value: Clear the current cart before changing store registration.

data.name: main.reregister.syncPending
data.value: Complete pending order sync before changing store registration.

data.name: main.reregister.submitted
data.value: Store switch submitted. Re-register this device to continue.

data.name: main.suspendedUnavailable
data.value: Suspended order service is not available.

data.name: main.scannerBindingReset
data.value: Scanner binding reset. Trigger the scanner again to bind the current device.

data.name: settings.linklyCloud.usernameRequired
data.value: Enter the Linkly Cloud API username first.

data.name: settings.linklyCloud.passwordRequired
data.value: Enter the Linkly Cloud API password, or save it on this POS first.

data.name: settings.linklyCloud.pairCodeRequired
data.value: Enter the Linkly VPP pair code first.

data.name: settings.linklyCloud.vendorIdMissing
data.value: Linkly POS vendor id is not configured.

data.name: settings.linklyCloud.vendorIdInvalid
data.value: Linkly POS vendor id must be a UUID v4.

data.name: dailyClose.status.ready
data.value: Ready to review daily close totals.

data.name: dailyClose.status.savedPrinted
data.value: Daily close saved and receipt printed.

data.name: dailyClose.status.savedPrintFailed
data.value: Daily close saved, but printing failed: {0}

data.name: dailyClose.status.historyEmpty
data.value: No daily close history found for the selected date.

data.name: linkly.local.amountMustBePositive
data.value: Card amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: linkly.local.requestSendFailed
data.value: ANZ Linkly transaction request could not be sent.

data.name: linkly.local.cancelOutcomeUnknown
data.value: ANZ Linkly cancellation outcome could not be confirmed.

data.name: linkly.local.emptyResponse
data.value: ANZ Linkly returned an empty response.

data.name: linkly.cloud.test.notLoggedOn
data.value: Linkly Cloud connection reached the terminal, but the terminal is not logged on.

data.name: linkly.cloud.pairingInvalid
data.value: Linkly Cloud pairing is invalid. Pair the terminal again.

data.name: linkly.cloud.refundMissingReference
data.value: Linkly Cloud refund requires an original RFN reference.

data.name: linkly.cloud.amountMustBePositive
data.value: Card amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: linkly.cloud.notPaired
data.value: Linkly Cloud terminal is not paired.

data.name: linkly.cloud.vendorIdMissing
data.value: Linkly POS vendor id is not configured.

data.name: linkly.cloud.notSubmitted
data.value: Linkly Cloud transaction was not submitted. Retry the payment.

data.name: linkly.cloud.invalidResponse
data.value: Linkly Cloud returned an invalid response.

data.name: linkly.cloud.declined
data.value: ANZ Linkly Cloud transaction was declined.

data.name: linkly.cloud.directPendingMessage
data.value: Waiting for the card terminal result. Complete the operation on the terminal.

data.name: linkly.cloud.directStatusHelp
data.value: You can cancel on the terminal or send a POS cancel request. The final result is determined by Linkly.

data.name: linkly.cloud.directCancelRequested
data.value: Cancel request sent to the card terminal. Waiting for the final result.

data.name: linkly.cloud.directCancelFailed
data.value: Cancel request could not be sent. Try again or use the terminal.

data.name: linkly.backend.configValid
data.value: ANZ Linkly Cloud backend configuration is valid.

data.name: linkly.backend.configTestHttpFailed
data.value: ANZ Linkly Cloud backend configuration test failed with HTTP {0}.

data.name: linkly.backend.configIncomplete
data.value: ANZ Linkly Cloud backend configuration is incomplete.

data.name: linkly.backend.refundMissingReference
data.value: Linkly Cloud refund requires an original RFN reference.

data.name: linkly.backend.amountMustBePositive
data.value: Card amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: linkly.backend.timeout
data.value: ANZ Linkly Cloud transaction timed out.

data.name: linkly.backend.cancelled
data.value: ANZ Linkly Cloud transaction was cancelled.

data.name: linkly.backend.waitCancelled
data.value: Waiting for the ANZ Linkly Cloud backend response was cancelled before the transaction result could be confirmed.

data.name: linkly.backend.communicationFailed
data.value: ANZ Linkly Cloud backend communication failed.

data.name: linkly.backend.unavailable
data.value: ANZ Linkly Cloud backend API is offline. Cloud backend card payment was not started. Check the network or use another payment method.

data.name: linkly.backend.cancelledUnknown
data.value: Stopped waiting for the ANZ Linkly Cloud backend card result. The transaction may have reached the terminal; recover the previous transaction or confirm the result in Linkly before retrying.

data.name: linkly.backend.invalidResponse
data.value: ANZ Linkly Cloud backend returned an invalid response.

data.name: linkly.backend.activeSessionResume
data.value: Current terminal has an unfinished card transaction. Continuing to poll/recover that session.

data.name: linkly.backend.activeSessionUnavailable
data.value: Current terminal has an unfinished card transaction, but no recoverable active session was returned. Try again later.

data.name: linkly.backend.activeSessionRequiresRecovery
data.value: Current terminal already has an unfinished card transaction. Recover the previous transaction or ask a supervisor to confirm Linkly before starting a new payment.

data.name: linkly.backend.sendKeyFailed
data.value: Card terminal action failed. Try again or recover the transaction.

data.name: linkly.backend.notSubmitted
data.value: Linkly Cloud transaction was not submitted. Retry the payment.

data.name: linkly.backend.declined
data.value: ANZ Linkly Cloud transaction was declined.

data.name: installment.center.currentOrder.none
data.value: There is no current order available for a new installment.

data.name: installment.center.currentOrder.amount
data.value: Current order amount {0:C2}. A new installment can be created.

data.name: installment.center.search
data.value: Search order no., name, or phone

data.name: installment.center.offline
data.value: Offline mode only supports local cached installment orders.

data.name: installment.center.selected.customer.empty
data.value: Select an installment order on the left

data.name: installment.center.status.ready
data.value: Select an installment order to create or process.

data.name: installment.center.status.cardTerminalRequired
data.value: Configure a card terminal before adding a card repayment.

data.name: installment.create.offline
data.value: Installment orders cannot be created while offline.

data.name: installment.create.status.ready
data.value: Complete the customer, down payment, and installment details.

data.name: installment.create.status.missingCart
data.value: There is no current order available for installment creation.

data.name: installment.create.status.totalBelowMinimum
data.value: Installment order total must be at least $50. Use regular payment for orders below $50.

data.name: installment.create.payment.status.offline
data.value: Offline mode cannot submit a down payment.

data.name: installment.create.payment.status.downPaymentBelowMinimum
data.value: First payment must be at least $20.

data.name: installment.create.payment.status.cash
data.value: Cash down payment does not require an additional reference.

data.name: installment.create.payment.status.card.empty
data.value: Card down payment may include a transaction reference for reconciliation.

data.name: installment.create.payment.status.card.ready
data.value: Card down payment reference is ready.

data.name: installment.create.payment.status.voucher.ready
data.value: Voucher code and reservation token are ready.

data.name: cardRecovery.dialog.title.draftRestored
data.value: Previous card transaction was not completed

data.name: cardRecovery.dialog.title.failed
data.value: Previous card transaction was not successful

data.name: cardRecovery.dialog.title.unknown
data.value: Previous card transaction result is unknown

data.name: cardRecovery.dialog.title.activeSessionNotPaid
data.value: Previous Linkly transaction was not paid

data.name: cardRecovery.dialog.title.failedLastTransaction
data.value: Previous card transaction was not successful

data.name: cardRecovery.dialog.message.failedLastTransaction
data.value: A Transaction Status request without TxnRef has completed. The terminal returned that the previous transaction was not successful. Record the TxnRef, timestamp, and response code for certification.

data.name: cardRecovery.dialog.message.autoPrintSucceeded
data.value: The receipt was printed automatically. You can preview it here and reprint if needed.

data.name: cardRecovery.dialog.message.autoPrintFailed
data.value: The order was recovered, but automatic printing failed: {0}. Check the printer and use Print receipt.

data.name: cardRecovery.dialog.message.draftRestoredFallback
data.value: The cart has been restored. Please confirm payment again.

data.name: cardRecovery.dialog.message.failedFallback
data.value: The terminal result has been confirmed. Follow the prompt for manual handling.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.requiresReview
data.value: The previous card amount does not match the order amount. Ask a supervisor to confirm the Linkly backend status before handling.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.checking
data.value: A previous card transaction for {0:C2} was in progress before the POS closed. Checking the card terminal status.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.unknown
data.value: The previous card result cannot be confirmed. Ask a supervisor to confirm the Linkly backend status before continuing.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.currentCartNotEmpty
data.value: The previous card result needs handling, but the current cart already contains items. Complete or clear the current cart before recovering the previous order.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.approved
data.value: The previous card payment was successful. The order has been recovered and saved automatically.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.failed
data.value: The previous card payment failed: {0}. The order has been restored. Select a payment method again.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.noActiveSession
data.value: No unfinished Linkly session was found. You can try the card payment again.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.activeSessionUnknown
data.value: The previous Linkly session cannot be confirmed. Ask a supervisor to check Linkly before charging again.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.activeSessionStillPending
data.value: The previous Linkly session is still pending. Try recovery again or ask a supervisor to check Linkly.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.activeSessionApproved
data.value: The previous Linkly session may have succeeded. Ask a supervisor to verify txnRef {0} before charging again.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.activeSessionCleared
data.value: The previous Linkly session was not submitted or failed. It has been cleared; retry the current card payment.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.activeSessionApprovedCleared
data.value: The previous Linkly transaction was successful and has been cleared. Continue the current order.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.activeSessionNotPaidCleared
data.value: The previous Linkly transaction was not paid successfully and has been cleared. Continue the current order and retry payment if needed.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.activeSessionReceiptMissing
data.value: Linkly did not return receipt text for the previous transaction.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.activeSessionReceiptPrinterMissing
data.value: Linkly receipt printer is not available.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.activeSessionReceiptPrintFailed
data.value: Previous transaction receipt was not printed: {0}

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.activeSessionAcknowledgeFailed
data.value: The previous Linkly result was confirmed, but POS could not clear it with Linkly. Try recovery again or ask a supervisor before charging again.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.activeSessionManuallyCleared
data.value: The previous Linkly session was manually checked and cleared. Continue the current order.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.activeSessionManualClearFailed
data.value: POS could not clear the previous Linkly session. Try recovery again or check Linkly before charging again.

data.name: cardRecovery.linkly.activeSessionManualClearMissing
data.value: Cannot clear the previous Linkly session because the session id is missing.

data.name: cardRecovery.square.currentCartNotEmpty
data.value: The previous Square card result needs handling, but the current cart already contains items. Complete or clear the current cart before recovering the previous order.

data.name: cardRecovery.square.unknown
data.value: The previous Square card result cannot be confirmed. Ask a supervisor to confirm the Square backend status before continuing.

data.name: cardRecovery.square.checking
data.value: A previous Square card transaction for {0:C2} was in progress before the POS closed. Checking the card terminal status.

data.name: cardRecovery.square.missingCheckoutId
data.value: The previous Square card request may not have been submitted. Please take payment again.

data.name: cardRecovery.square.cancelled
data.value: The previous Square card payment was not completed: {0}. The order has been restored. Select a payment method again.

data.name: cardRecovery.square.amountMismatch
data.value: The payment amount returned by Square does not match the order amount. The order was not saved automatically. Ask a supervisor to confirm.

data.name: cardRecovery.square.approved
data.value: The previous Square card payment was successful. The order has been recovered and saved automatically.

data.name: settings.section.appUpdate.description
data.value: Check for a new WPF POS installer without interrupting the current checkout flow.

data.name: settings.status.appUpdateNotConfigured
data.value: Software update check is not configured.

data.name: settings.status.appUpdateLatest
data.value: Current version is already up to date.

data.name: settings.status.appUpdateAlreadyRunning
data.value: Software update check is already running.

data.name: settings.status.appUpdateCheckFailed
data.value: Software update check failed. Please try again later.

data.name: settings.status.appUpdatePolicyFailed
data.value: Update policy is unavailable. Please contact an administrator.

data.name: settings.status.appUpdateReady
data.value: Software update is ready to install.

data.name: settings.status.appUpdateInstallFailed
data.value: Software update installer failed to start. {0}

data.name: appUpdate.optional.prompt.message
data.value: Version {0} is available. Download and install now?

data.name: appUpdate.optional.ready
data.value: New version has been downloaded. Install when the terminal is idle.

data.name: appUpdate.force.ready
data.value: Install this required update before continuing checkout.

data.name: appUpdate.force.minimumRequired
data.value: This terminal is below the minimum supported version ({0}). Install the required update before continuing checkout.

data.name: appUpdate.force.rollbackReady
data.value: Roll back to version {0} before continuing checkout.

data.name: appUpdate.force.downloadFailedDefault
data.value: Update download failed. Contact an administrator.

data.name: appUpdate.startup.checkFailed
data.value: Software update check failed during startup: {0}

data.name: appUpdate.install.activeTransaction
data.value: Complete or clear the current transaction before installing the update.

data.name: appUpdate.install.failed
data.value: Could not start the update installer. {0}
